jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Evok
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!
